paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.05, with a 2.02% change from the prior close and a -36.32% change over a 20-session window. The price quote is as of July 17, 2026.

There are no new news headlines in the last 24 hours, but recent news includes articles about the company's stock performance, CEO departure, and governance concerns. A filing with the SEC stated that CEO Toby Neugebauer had left the company as of April 17, 2026, and an Interim Office of the CEO had been set up. Retail traders have turned bullish on the stock despite a sharp selloff.

Recent SEC filings include an 8-K form disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another 8-K form disclosing the immediate resignation of director Miles Everson due to a disagreement over access to company books and records. There is one Form 4 filing in the feed, but no Form 144 filings.
